mypaintr 0.0.1
  • Reference
    • Hand Demo
    • Introduction to mypaintr

Compute or draw rough polygons

Source: R/draw-rough.R
rough_polygons.Rd

Compute or draw rough polygons

Usage

rough_polygons(x, y = NULL, hand = NULL)

rough_polygon(x, y = NULL, hand = NULL)

draw_rough_polygons(
  x,
  y = NULL,
  hand = NULL,
  col = NA,
  border = graphics::par("fg"),
  fill_pattern = NULL,
  ...
)

Arguments

x, y

Polygon coordinates.

hand

Hand-drawn geometry settings created with hand().

col

Fill colour. When visible and fill_pattern is NULL, a solid fill is drawn.

border

Border colour.

fill_pattern

Optional fill pattern created with hatch(), crosshatch(), zigzag(), or jumble().

...

Graphics parameters passed to graphics::lines().

Value

A list with x and y components containing a roughened closed outline suitable for plotting with graphics::lines().

See also

Other rough drawing helpers: rough_arrows(), rough_lines(), rough_points(), rough_polypath(), rough_rect(), rough_segments()

Examples

rough_polygons(c(2, 5, 8, 3), c(2, 7, 5, 1))
#> $x
#>   [1] 2.000000 2.044320 2.088922 2.133802 2.178955 2.224377 2.270059 2.315996
#>   [9] 2.362177 2.408594 2.455234 2.502086 2.549138 2.596374 2.643781 2.691343
#>  [17] 2.739044 2.786866 2.834791 2.882802 2.930879 2.979003 3.027153 3.074315
#>  [25] 3.118000 3.161452 3.204677 3.247684 3.290481 3.333077 3.375480 3.417701
#>  [33] 3.459750 3.501638 3.543376 3.584975 3.626446 3.667803 3.709056 3.750219
#>  [41] 3.791303 3.832322 3.873287 3.914212 3.955109 3.995991 4.037142 4.078598
#>  [49] 4.120041 4.161478 4.202917 4.244367 4.285835 4.327329 4.368856 4.410425
#>  [57] 4.452041 4.493712 4.535444 4.577243 4.619114 4.661064 4.703097 4.745218
#>  [65] 4.787432 4.829741 4.872149 4.914661 4.957277 5.000000 5.071818 5.143401
#>  [73] 5.214740 5.285831 5.356670 5.427257 5.497594 5.567686 5.637538 5.707162
#>  [81] 5.776567 5.845767 5.914777 5.983615 6.055137 6.127412 6.199764 6.272156
#>  [89] 6.344549 6.416905 6.489183 6.561347 6.633356 6.705174 6.776764 6.848092
#>  [97] 6.919125 6.989831 7.058476 7.125905 7.193230 7.260469 7.327643 7.394773
#> [105] 7.461878 7.528977 7.596089 7.663233 7.730425 7.797683 7.865022 7.932456
#> [113] 8.000000 7.931677 7.863096 7.794265 7.725188 7.655873 7.586328 7.516563
#> [121] 7.446585 7.376407 7.306040 7.235494 7.164783 7.093921 7.022921 6.951798
#> [129] 6.880566 6.809243 6.737844 6.666385 6.594885 6.523360 6.451829 6.380309
#> [137] 6.308819 6.237378 6.169320 6.101784 6.034491 5.967439 5.900629 5.834058
#> [145] 5.767725 5.701629 5.635765 5.570132 5.504726 5.439543 5.374579 5.309829
#> [153] 5.245289 5.180952 5.116814 5.052869 4.989109 4.925529 4.862121 4.798879
#> [161] 4.735795 4.672862 4.610072 4.548305 4.486784 4.425323 4.363907 4.302525
#> [169] 4.241162 4.179805 4.118442 4.057060 3.995646 3.934188 3.872675 3.811094
#> [177] 3.749436 3.687688 3.625842 3.563886 3.501812 3.439610 3.377273 3.314793
#> [185] 3.252161 3.189372 3.126419 3.063297 3.000000 2.940063 2.880204 2.820312
#> [193] 2.760269 2.699959 2.639345 2.578291 2.516674 2.454416 2.391465 2.327217
#> [201] 2.261806 2.196217 2.130620 2.065169 2.000000
#> 
#> $y
#>   [1] 2.000000 2.071958 2.143748 2.215371 2.286830 2.358128 2.429269 2.500257
#>   [9] 2.571099 2.641800 2.712367 2.782806 2.853126 2.923335 2.993441 3.063455
#>  [17] 3.133385 3.203243 3.273038 3.342782 3.412487 3.482164 3.551824 3.622078
#>  [25] 3.694417 3.766897 3.839513 3.912259 3.985132 4.058125 4.131234 4.204452
#>  [33] 4.277773 4.351191 4.424699 4.498290 4.571958 4.645695 4.719494 4.793347
#>  [41] 4.867247 4.941187 5.015158 5.089154 5.163166 5.237188 5.311048 5.384725
#>  [49] 5.458410 5.532099 5.605786 5.679467 5.753137 5.826791 5.900425 5.974035
#>  [57] 6.047616 6.121164 6.194676 6.268147 6.341575 6.414956 6.488286 6.561565
#>  [65] 6.634787 6.707953 6.781058 6.854102 6.927083 7.000000 6.956564 6.912776
#>  [73] 6.868622 6.824095 6.779191 6.733909 6.688252 6.642226 6.595843 6.549115
#>  [81] 6.502060 6.454697 6.407050 6.359144 6.315264 6.272513 6.229878 6.187303
#>  [89] 6.144730 6.102101 6.059357 6.016439 5.973290 5.929854 5.886076 5.841905
#>  [97] 5.797291 5.752189 5.703993 5.653974 5.603798 5.553494 5.503093 5.452625
#> [105] 5.402119 5.351605 5.301111 5.250663 5.200289 5.150013 5.099858 5.049847
#> [113] 5.000000 4.950536 4.901393 4.852564 4.804042 4.755817 4.707879 4.660218
#> [121] 4.612821 4.565675 4.518766 4.472080 4.425600 4.379309 4.333191 4.287227
#> [129] 4.241397 4.195683 4.150064 4.104518 4.059026 4.013563 3.968109 3.922640
#> [137] 3.877134 3.831566 3.781772 3.731323 3.680571 3.629517 3.578161 3.526506
#> [145] 3.474554 3.422306 3.369767 3.316940 3.263829 3.210439 3.156776 3.102845
#> [153] 3.048652 2.994204 2.939508 2.884572 2.829403 2.774010 2.718401 2.662585
#> [161] 2.606572 2.550370 2.493989 2.436330 2.378362 2.320321 2.262221 2.204081
#> [169] 2.145916 2.087743 2.029579 1.971438 1.913337 1.855291 1.797314 1.739421
#> [177] 1.681626 1.623942 1.566382 1.508958 1.451683 1.394566 1.337619 1.280851
#> [185] 1.224272 1.167890 1.111713 1.055747 1.000000 1.065063 1.130204 1.195312
#> [193] 1.260269 1.324959 1.389345 1.453291 1.516674 1.579416 1.641465 1.702217
#> [201] 1.761806 1.821217 1.880620 1.940169 2.000000
#> 
plot(1:10, 1:10, type = "n")
draw_rough_polygons(c(2, 5, 8, 3), c(2, 7, 5, 1),
                    col = "grey90",
                    fill_pattern = zigzag())
